response:
<Case>
  <Domain>
    <Size x="2.84" y="3.0" z="0.0"/>
    <Resolution x="100" y="100" z="0"/>
    <Time t="0.0" dt="0.001" tEnd="10.0"/>
  </Domain>
  <BoundaryConditions>
    <Solid>
      <Wall x="-1.42" y="0.0" z="0.0" x2="1.42" y2="0.0" z2="0.0"/>
      <Wall x="-1.42" y="3.0" z="0.0" x2="1.42" y2="3.0" z2="0.0"/>
      <Wall x="-1.42" y="0.0" z="0.0" x2="-1.42" y2="3.0" z2="0.0"/>
      <Wall x="1.42" y="0.0" z="0.0" x2="1.42" y2="3.0" z2="0.0"/>
    </Solid>
  </BoundaryConditions>
  <MovingBoundary>
    <Wall x="-1.42" y="0.0" z="0.0" x2="-1.42" y2="3.0" z2="0.0">
      <Motion type="Sinusoidal" dir="x" amp="0.01" freq="0.5"/>
    </Wall>
    <Wall x="1.42" y="0.0" z="0.0" x2="1.42" y2="3.0" z2="0.0">
      <Motion type="Sinusoidal" dir="x" amp="0.01" freq="0.5"/>
    </Wall>
  </MovingBoundary>
  <InitialConditions>
    <Fluid>
      <Region x="-1.42" y="0.0" z="0.0" x2="1.42" y2="1.5" z2="0.0"/>
    </Fluid>
  </InitialConditions>
  <Forces>
    <Gravity y="-9.81"/>
  </Forces>
</Case>
